sentences.target: On se retrouve devant le bâtiment.

translations.fr: On se retrouve devant le bâtiment.
translations.en: Let’s meet in front of the building.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns vor dem Gebäude.
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar em frente ao prédio.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau trước tòa nhà.
translations.nl: Laten we voor het gebouw afspreken.
translations.hi: चलो इमारत के सामने मिलते हैं।
translations.el: Ας συναντηθούμε μπροστά από το κτήριο.
translations.ro: Hai să ne întâlnim în fața clădirii.
translations.ja: 建物の前で会いましょう。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun commonly used for ‘we’; controls 3rd singular agreement on the verb.
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun marking the pronominal verb ‘se retrouver’.
Main verb in the present, 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘On’. In pronominal use means ‘meet up’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘bâtiment’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘devant’.

sentences.target: Ce bâtiment est en rénovation cette année.
sentences.reading: /sə batimɑ̃ ɛ t‿ɑ̃ ʁenovasjɔ̃ sɛt ane/

translations.fr: Ce bâtiment est en rénovation cette année.
translations.ipa: /sə batimɑ̃ ɛ t‿ɑ̃ ʁenovasjɔ̃ sɛt ane/
translations.en: This building is under renovation this year.
translations.es: Este edificio está en obras este año.
translations.de: Dieses Gebäude wird dieses Jahr renoviert.
translations.it: Questo edificio è in ristrutturazione quest'anno.
translations.yue: 呢幢大廈今年喺度翻新。
translations.ru: Это здание ремонтируют в этом году.
translations.pt: Este prédio está em reforma este ano.
translations.vi: Tòa nhà này đang được tu sửa trong năm nay.
translations.ar: هذا المبنى قيد الترميم هذا العام.
translations.nl: Dit gebouw wordt dit jaar gerenoveerd.
translations.hu: Ez az épület idén felújítás alatt áll.
translations.hi: इस साल इस इमारत का नवीनीकरण हो रहा है।
translations.pl: Ten budynek jest w tym roku remontowany.
translations.el: Αυτό το κτήριο είναι υπό ανακαίνιση φέτος.
translations.nb: Denne bygningen er under oppussing i år.
translations.id: Gedung ini sedang direnovasi tahun ini.
translations.sv: Den här byggnaden är under renovering i år.
translations.ro: Clădirea aceasta este în curs de renovare anul acesta.
translations.cs: Tato budova je letos v rekonstrukci.
translations.da: Denne bygning er under renovering i år.
translations.fi: Tämä rakennus on tänä vuonna remontissa.
translations.ja: この建物は今年改修中です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘bâtiment’ (masculine singular).
Common noun serving as the subject of the copula.
Copular verb, present 3rd person singular, linking the subject to the predicate.
Preposition introducing the predicate complement ‘rénovation’ (state).
Noun headed by ‘en’ to express the ongoing state; part of the predicate.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying ‘année’ (temporal adjunct).
Common noun; temporal complement specifying the time frame.

sentences.target: Tu travailles dans ce bâtiment maintenant.

translations.fr: Tu travailles dans ce bâtiment maintenant.
translations.en: You work in this building now.
translations.de: Du arbeitest jetzt in diesem Gebäude.
translations.zh-Hans: 你现在在这栋楼里工作。
translations.yue: 你而家喺呢幢大廈工作。
translations.ru: Ты теперь работаешь в этом здании.
translations.vi: Bây giờ bạn làm việc trong tòa nhà này.
translations.ar: أنت تعمل الآن في هذا المبنى.
translations.nl: Je werkt nu in dit gebouw.
translations.uk: Ти зараз працюєш у цій будівлі.
translations.hi: अब तुम इस इमारत में काम करते हो।
translations.el: Τώρα δουλεύεις σε αυτό το κτήριο.
translations.nb: Nå jobber du i denne bygningen.
translations.id: Sekarang kamu bekerja di gedung ini.
translations.sv: Nu jobbar du i den här byggnaden.
translations.da: Nu arbejder du i denne bygning.
translations.ja: 今この建物で働いています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present 2nd person singular; agrees with ‘Tu’.
Preposition indicating location.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular) modifying ‘bâtiment’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘dans’.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Ils prennent des photos du bâtiment ancien.
sentences.reading: /il pʁɛn de foto dy batimɑ̃ ɑ̃sjɛ̃/

translations.fr: Ils prennent des photos du bâtiment ancien.
translations.ipa: /il pʁɛn de foto dy batimɑ̃ ɑ̃sjɛ̃/
translations.en: They’re taking photos of the old building.
translations.es: Están tomando fotos del edificio antiguo.
translations.de: Sie machen Fotos vom alten Gebäude.
translations.it: Stanno scattando foto al vecchio edificio.
translations.ko: 그들은 오래된 건물의 사진을 찍고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在拍那座老建筑的照片。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺度影舊建築物嘅相。
translations.pt: Eles estão tirando fotos do prédio antigo.
translations.vi: Họ đang chụp ảnh tòa nhà cổ.
translations.nl: Ze maken foto's van het oude gebouw.
translations.hi: वे पुराने भवन की तस्वीरें ले रहे हैं।
translations.nb: De tar bilder av den gamle bygningen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang memotret gedung tua itu.
translations.sv: De tar bilder av den gamla byggnaden.
translations.da: De tager billeder af den gamle bygning.
translations.ja: 彼らは古い建物の写真を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun.
Main verb, present 3rd person plural.
Indefinite plural article introducing the direct object ‘photos’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘prennent’.
Contraction of ‘de + le’; preposition marking a nominal complement (‘du bâtiment’).
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘du’.
Adjective; post-nominal modifier of ‘bâtiment’ indicating age/oldness.
